task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the job search dataset in a spreadsheet application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) is open, displaying rows of job application data, company names, and compensation details.

task_completion.description: Verify the total annual compensation for Company A (TechStart Inc) is correctly calculated and displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cell associated with 'TechStart Inc' or 'Company A' shows the total compensation value of $88,000 (or 88000).

task_completion.description: Verify the total annual compensation for Company B (DataCorp) is correctly calculated and displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cell associated with 'DataCorp' or 'Company B' shows the total compensation value of $96,200 (or 96200).

task_completion.description: Verify that follow-up requirements are documented in the comparison.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific column, section, or cell contains text detailing follow-up actions or requirements for the job offers (e.g., 'email recruiter', 'send references', 'schedule call').

task_completion.description: Verify the results are saved to the specified file path and name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet application's title bar shows 'job_search_analysis.xlsx', or there is a 'Save As' dialog visible saving the file to '/home/ga/Documents/job_search_analysis.xlsx', or a terminal window shows the file successfully created in that directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical spreadsheet application to process the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a GUI spreadsheet tool (like LibreOffice Calc) rather than exclusively using terminal scripts (like Python/pandas) to generate the output file blindly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually performed calculations or data entry within the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet should show active cells, formula bar usage, or typed data, indicating genuine interaction with the document rather than just copying a pre-made file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just paste the prompt text into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output must be a structured spreadsheet (.xlsx format) with rows and columns, not a plain text file containing the literal text of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Company A (TechStart Inc) total compensation must be exactly $88,000 ($75,000 base + $5,000 signing bonus + $8,000 benefits). Company B (DataCorp) total compensation must be exactly $96,200 ($82,000 base + $8,200 annual bonus + $6,000 benefits). Any hourly-to-annual conversions should use a 2080 hours/year multiplier (e.g., $28/hr = $58,240/year). The final output must be a spreadsheet named 'job_search_analysis.xlsx' located in /home/ga/Documents/.
